## Documentation Governance Checklist

- [ ] Backlog phase/status updates are reflected in `APOTHEON_V9_ENTERPRISE_SKILL_OS_BACKLOG.md` when applicable.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` includes a release entry for shipped work, or this PR includes an explicit **not released** justification.
- [ ] Canonical document owner was updated for this concept and no duplicated long-form prose was introduced.
